languageDesc: Choose the display language for the app
minimizeToTrayDesc: Keep running in system tray when closed
showNotificationsDesc: Display a notification when operations complete
threatDetectionAlertsDesc: Show a system notification when suspicious network activity is detected
autoRestartDesc: Restart automatically when an update is downloaded
updateCheckIntervalDesc: How often to check for updates in the background
cloudDescription: Monitor threats across all your systems, manage centralized cleaning profiles, trigger remote scans, and get real-time health telemetry — all from one dashboard.
cloudAlreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Paste your API key below to link this device.
cloudTelemetryDisclaimer: Only CPU & memory usage, disk space, network stats, uptime, and periodic health reports ({{registryExtra}}updates, privacy, malware). No file paths or personal data.
cloudLinkFailedDefaultDesc: Check your API key and try again
cloudLinkFailedConnectionDesc: Could not connect to cloud server
cloudReconnectFailedDesc: Check your network connection and try again
cloudShareDiskHealthDesc: Include disk SMART data in telemetry
cloudThreatMonitorDesc: Scan connections against known-malicious IPs and domains
cloudThreatListDescWaiting: Waiting for cloud to push a threat list
cloudCveMonitorDesc: Scan installed software for known security vulnerabilities
cloudRemotePowerDesc: Allow cloud to shutdown or restart this device
cloudRemoteCleanupDescWindows: Allow cloud to delete files, remove bloatware, and fix registry
cloudRemoteCleanupDescOther: Allow cloud to delete files and perform cleanup
cloudRemoteInstallsDescWindows: Allow cloud to install software, driver, and Windows updates
cloudRemoteInstallsDescOther: Allow cloud to install software and system updates
cloudRemoteConfigDesc: Allow cloud to toggle startup items, services, and privacy settings
cloudTelemetryIntervalDesc: How often system stats are sent
secureDeleteDesc: Overwrite files before deletion for sensitive data (slower)
closeBrowsersDesc: Automatically close browsers to unlock cache files
createRestorePointDesc: Create a system restore point before cleaning (requires admin)
skipRecentFilesDesc: Don't delete files modified within this time
startupSettingFailedDesc: Task Scheduler may be restricted by group policy or security software.
